# Syntalix LLP
> India-based AI/ML and software development consultancy serving India and international clients.

## Services
- [AI & ML Infrastructure](/services/ai-ml-infrastructure): Custom AI and machine learning systems, MLOps, model training and deployment.
- [LLM Engineering](/services/llm-engineering): Large language model integration, fine-tuning, RAG systems, and prompt engineering.
- [Agentic AI Systems](/services/agentic-systems): Autonomous agent workflows, multi-agent orchestration, and AI automation.
- [Web & Mobile Development](/services/web-mobile-development): Enterprise websites, web applications, SaaS platforms, and mobile apps.
